changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Mark storage devices in Biorepository Laboratory rooms as biorepository storage so Biorepository workflow pages can resolve rooms and devices.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.storage_device sd SET biorepository_storage = true FROM clinlims.storage_room sr JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON ts.id = sr.department_test_section_id WHERE sd.parent_room_id = sr.id AND lower(trim(ts.name)) = 'biorepository laboratory' AND COALESCE(sd.biorepository_storage, false) = false;

changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Backfill notebook_departments for Biorepository notebooks that still have no department link (for example orphan lab instances).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON lower(trim(ts.name)) = 'biorepository laboratory' WHERE ( n.title LIKE 'Biorepository Laboratory%' OR n.workflow_type = 'biorepository' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id );

changeSet.author: ahri-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Link orphan Biorepository lab instances to the Biorepository template so department inheritance resolves consistently.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook child SET parent_notebook_id = template.id FROM clinlims.notebook template WHERE child.parent_notebook_id IS NULL AND child.is_template = false AND child.title LIKE 'Biorepository Laboratory%' AND template.is_template = true AND template.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND child.id <> template.id;
